stories.title: Barnwell built a 53-man NFL roster entirely made u...
stories.summary: Nick Herbig rushing the passer while Martin Emerson Jr. plays in coverage? DeMario Douglas catching passes from Fernando Mendoza? Let's fill out a full roster of nonstarters.

stories.title: Which players dropped out of the NFL top-10 rankin...
stories.summary: New players joined the top 10, which means others dropped out. Here's who's trying to get back.

stories.title: Michigan AD Manuel to step down at end of year
stories.summary: Warde Manuel will step down as Michigan AD at the end of the calendar year, the school announced as part of the conclusion of an investigation into the culture of athletics at the university.

stories.title: FIFA to investigate players clash after WC final
stories.summary: FIFA has opened a disciplinary investigation into the ugly scenes which marred the end of Sunday's World Cup involving several Argentina players and coaches physically attacking members of the Spain team.

stories.title: Sources: Thybulle, Lakers agree to 1-year deal
stories.summary: Free agent forward Matisse Thybulle has agreed on a one-year, $3.3 million deal to sign with the Los Angeles Lakers, sources told ESPN.
